title: Interview Guide for the Management Team on School Climate
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1v8eg","text":"Interview Guide for the Management Team on School Climate. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e79vn","text":"The school climate (SC) is defined as the conditions present within a learning environment that influence the development of educational practices in the context of the school. A positive school climate is crucial for enhancing learning opportunities, student academic performance, and the overall quality of daily schoolwork, thereby promoting educational sustainability.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5hkoo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fa41g","text":"This guide was used in the funded research projects \"Diagnosis of Educational Performance in Primary Education: A First Step Towards School Effectiveness\" (US-1263333) and \"Analysis of Andalusian Schools with Very High and Very Low Effectiveness: Guidelines for School Improvement\" (EDU2017-84649-P), led by principal investigators Juan-Jesús Torres-Gordillo and Javier Rodríguez-Santero.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cknmg","text":"This guide was used in the funded research projects \"Diagnosis of Educational Performance in Primary Education: A First Step Towards School Effectiveness\" (US-1263333) and \"Analysis of Andalusian Schools with Very High and Very Low Effectiveness: Guidelines for School Improvement\" (EDU2017-84649-P),\nled by principal investigators Juan-Jesús Torres-Gordillo and Javier Rodríguez-Santero.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Juan Jesús Torres-Gordillo
